description: Integration layer connecting Reality Capture Engine with Predicted Build Sandbox, Time Engine, and Global Atlas. Runs a continuous deviation-detection and correction loop.

predicted_build_sandbox.role: Source of truth for planned construction state at any point in time

time_engine.role: Temporal index aligning scan timestamps to construction schedule phases

global_atlas.role: Geospatial registry mapping site coordinates to project elements and zones

steps.name: Reality Capture
steps.description: Ingest normalized point_clouds, mesh_models, image_sets from spatial_device_adapters.

steps.name: Compare Design
steps.description: Diff as_built_snapshot against BIM design model retrieved from Global Atlas.

steps.name: Compare Planned
steps.description: Diff as_built_snapshot against Predicted Build Sandbox state at scan_timestamp via Time Engine.

steps.name: Detect Deviation
steps.description: Classify deviations by severity — pass (<15mm), flag (15–50mm), fail (>50mm). Flag schedule slippage.

steps.name: Suggest Correction
steps.description: Generate corrective actions: rework orders, RFIs, schedule adjustments, re-scan requests.

steps.name: Update Sandbox
steps.description: Push verified as-built data back into Predicted Build Sandbox to rebase future predictions. Update Global Atlas and Time Engine.
